nasb.text: that the sons of God saw that the daughters of men were beautiful; and they took wives for themselves, whomever they chose.

esv.text: the sons of God saw that the daughters of man were attractive. And they took as their wives any they chose.

cnv.text: 神的眾子看見人的女子美麗，就隨意挑選，娶作妻子。

ccb.text: 上帝的儿子们看见人的女儿漂亮，就随意选来做妻子。

csbs.text: 神的儿子们看到人的女儿们美丽，就从中任意挑选，为自己娶来为妻。
